description: The field should default to false. Manifestations with this field set should be excluded from search results (update the Chewy index conditions). Add the boolean checkbox to the form under the manifestation details section ('פרטי מימוש'). Remember to read AI_ARCHITECTURE_PRIMER.md, and use I18n strings. If anything is unclear, ask me. Create and run tests for what you implement, but wait for my approval to run the full test suite or push any changes.
title: Add a boolean exclude_from_search field to Manifestation
